title: Warfarin
summary: Warfarin is used to:   prevent and treat blood clots  prevent complications in people with certain types of irregular heartbeat, people with prosthetic (replacement or mechanical) heart valves, and people who have had a heart attack or stroke. Warfarin is in a class of medications called anticoagulants ('blood thinners'). It works by decreasing the clotting ability of the blood.
